etymology.description: semantic 食(食) (shí, "food") + phonetic 氣(氣) (qì, "air") -> meaning
etymology.interpretation: The character 餼(xì, "gift") combines the element 食(食) (shí, "food"), indicating something associated with food or eating, with the phonetic 氣(氣) (qì, "air") to suggest the sound. Originally, it referred to offerings or food gifts given during ancestral sacrifices, highlighting the idea of a material gift.
etymology.simplification: Simplified from 餼 to 饩 by replacing 氣(氣) (qì, "air") with the simplified 气(气) (qì, "air"), reducing the number of strokes.
